headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on American International Gr, Lowers Price Target to $85
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $86 to $85.

headline: AIG to sell remaining stake in Corebridge
summary: The transaction is scheduled for completion on 7 May and is set to generate roughly $710m in net proceeds for AIG.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on American International Gr, Raises Price Target to $86
summary: Mizuho  analyst Yaron Kinar   maintains American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $84 to $86.
